name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project

---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you are facing. What are you trying to do that
is currently hard or impossible? ("I'm frustrated when ...")

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered, and why they fall
short.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or links about the feature request here.
